input_text: The stone was heavy. A hand of a man moved a wheel. The letter was written by Eve. Mr Dursley is a catholic. Tom refused to eat the soup. The toy of the child was broken. The cup filled with water fell. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Sandra travelled to the hallway. The bike is small. While John was cooking, Mary read a book. The dog was barking and the cat was too. Mike is male. Jessica is a mouse. Agatha is in trouble. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Sue is a true patriot. The guide offered the tourists tea. "Riga is not in America. Is the bike red?
